meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for general-defi — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly. Only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: 1. First Depositor / Inflation Attack
cards.detect: ERC4626 and similar vault implementations calculate shares as `assets * totalSupply / totalAssets`.
check: VERIFY: ERC4626 and similar vault implementations calculate shares as `assets * totalSupply / totalAssets`.
Check for virtual shares/assets implementation
Verify minimum initial deposit requirements
Ensure vault cannot be reset to zero supply state
LOOK FOR: ERC4626 implementation without virtual offsets
cards.antipattern: No protection against first depositor attack
